# CWE-421 negative: synchronized access to alternate SSE channel (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-421-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var (
	wireMu   sync.Mutex
	wireCode string
)

func RegisterWireHandlers() {
	http.HandleFunc("/wire/authorize", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = r.ParseForm()
		wireMu.Lock()
		wireCode = r.FormValue("token")
		wireMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	http.HandleFunc("/wire/events", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		flusher, ok := w.(http.Flusher)
		if !ok {
			http.Error(w, "streaming unsupported", http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		wireMu.Lock()
		payload := wireCode
		wireMu.Unlock()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/event-stream")
		fmt.Fprintf(w, "event: status\ndata: %s\n\n", payload)
		flusher.Flush()
	})
}
